The '''Towani family star cruiser''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] used by the [[Towani family]]. It crash landed on the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] and was later repaired by [[Jeremitt Towani]] in [[Duel on Dagobah (3 ABY)|3 ABY]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The ship was designed by [[Bill George]], who re-used wings from a full-size [[Snowspeeder/Legends|snowspeeder]] that had been built for [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].<ref>{{Blogspot|subdomain=starlogged|url=2013/06/1984-caravan-of-courage-in-return-of.html|name=Starlogged|text=1984: CARAVAN OF COURAGE in RETURN OF THE JEDI weekly (Marvel UK)}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]''
